testcase.name: test_image_input_route_fails_closed_for_unknown_main_model
testcase.failure:
monkeypatch = <_pytest.monkeypatch.MonkeyPatch object at 0x107368890>
def test_image_input_route_fails_closed_for_unknown_main_model(monkeypatch): generation = _generation() _install_runtime(monkeypatch, generation=generation) monkeypatch.setattr( image_routing, "_lookup_supports_vision", lambda *_args, **_kwargs: None, )
> decision = image_runtime.resolve_image_input_route( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ "unknown-provider", "unknown-model", {}, ) E AttributeError: module 'agent.image_runtime' has no attribute 'resolve_image_input_route'
tests/cli/test_image_capability_consistency.py:79: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_text_route_requires_current_verified_auxiliary_snapshot
testcase.failure:
monkeypatch = <_pytest.monkeypatch.MonkeyPatch object at 0x1072bd010>
def test_text_route_requires_current_verified_auxiliary_snapshot(monkeypatch): generation = _generation( vision_status="configured_unverified", vision_available=False, ) _install_runtime( monkeypatch, generation=generation, vision_reason="verification_required", ) monkeypatch.setattr( image_routing, "_lookup_supports_vision", lambda *_args, **_kwargs: False, )
> decision = image_runtime.resolve_image_input_route( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ "text-provider", "text-model", {"agent": {"image_input_mode": "text"}}, ) E AttributeError: module 'agent.image_runtime' has no attribute 'resolve_image_input_route'
tests/cli/test_image_capability_consistency.py:107: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_auto_route_uses_verified_auxiliary_for_nonvision_main_model
testcase.failure:
monkeypatch = <_pytest.monkeypatch.MonkeyPatch object at 0x1077a3390>
def test_auto_route_uses_verified_auxiliary_for_nonvision_main_model(monkeypatch): generation = _generation() _install_runtime(monkeypatch, generation=generation) monkeypatch.setattr( image_routing, "_lookup_supports_vision", lambda *_args, **_kwargs: False, )
> decision = image_runtime.resolve_image_input_route( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ "text-provider", "text-model", {}, ) E AttributeError: module 'agent.image_runtime' has no attribute 'resolve_image_input_route'
tests/cli/test_image_capability_consistency.py:128: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_native_route_uses_same_combined_generation
testcase.failure:
monkeypatch = <_pytest.monkeypatch.MonkeyPatch object at 0x1073aae90>
def test_native_route_uses_same_combined_generation(monkeypatch): generation = _generation() _install_runtime(monkeypatch, generation=generation) monkeypatch.setattr( image_routing, "_lookup_supports_vision", lambda *_args, **_kwargs: True, )
> decision = image_runtime.resolve_image_input_route( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ "vision-provider", "vision-model", {}, ) E AttributeError: module 'agent.image_runtime' has no attribute 'resolve_image_input_route'
tests/cli/test_image_capability_consistency.py:149: AttributeError
